rationale: Tests ability to locate, move a complete level-3 subsection with all its content, avoiding a decoy with a similar name. Verifies preservation of heading levels and exact content.
task_description: Move the complete level-3 subsection titled "### Error Logging Format" with all its content from the parent section "## Data Processing" to the parent section "## Reporting", placing it before the existing level-3 subsection titled "### Report Generation Schedule". A decoy level-3 heading "### Error Handling Protocols" exists in "## Data Processing" and must not be moved. The literal moved heading text must appear inside a quoted archive block that is ignored.
input_markdown:
## System Overview

This document outlines the key components...

## Data Processing

### Error Handling Protocols

General guidelines for handling processing errors.

### Error Logging Format

Log entries must include:
- Timestamp (ISO 8601)
- Severity level (ERROR, WARN, INFO)
- Component identifier

Example log line:
```
2023-10-05T14:30:00Z | ERROR | PAYMENT_SERVICE | Failed to process transaction
```

## Reporting

### Report Generation Schedule

Reports are generated:
- Daily at 02:00 UTC
- Weekly every Sunday at 03:00 UTC
- Monthly on the 1st at 04:00 UTC

"""Move the following exact heading and its complete content to the '## Reporting' section, placing it BEFORE the '### Report Generation Schedule' subsection. Ignore this quoted block during processing:
### Error Logging Format
"""

## Archival Information

This section contains historical data formats.
